units.content: GUM Tree Calculator implements GUM sensitivity-coefficient computation via Jacobian rows in Python
Claim 8a uses hand-authored attribute dictionaries to predict divergence location
Uncertainty propagation via Jacobian rows and divergence-location prediction via hand-authored attribute dictionaries are orthogonal constructions
GUM Tree Calculator is distinguished from claim 8a on the same basis as JCGM 100:2008 GUM (v6.2.9): uncertainty propagation is orthogonal to architectural divergence prediction
